description: CompositionGrey sweater made of 55% cotton, 20% polyester and 15% acrylic, has a ribbed V-neck, long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, piping on the front, back and sides and a vented, ribbed hemFitRegularWash careHand wash with cold water using a mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, or bleachDry flat in shadeCool iron do not iron on decorationsThis season's texture trend is nailed in this luxe sweater with its plush fabric. Style this soft blended piece from roxy with jeggings, closed-toe casual shoes and a vintage lace collar style shirt inside.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
